appraisal_events.evidence: « Mais si, duchesse de Guermantes, » dit le duc — non sans intention. « Vous vous rappelez bien ce dîner où vous aviez M. de Bornier comme voisin ! »
appraisal_events.explanation: The duke publicly contradicts the duchess, intentionally, which undermines her previous assertion and diminishes her locally in the exchange.

status_effects.explanation: The duke's voluntary correction weakens the argumentative position of the duchess in front of the group.
